activity.body: Karen Chen, Discharge Planner at UCSF Mission Bay — booked intro for Thu 2:30 PM.
David Reyes, Elder Law at Reyes & Goldman — "send me your intake packet, I have two clients this week."
Priya Anand, Social Worker at Laguna Honda — asked about overnight rates and minimum hours.
Dr. Marcus Hall, Geriatrician at One Medical Pacific Heights — wants to add us to his referral list.
Linda Okafor, Director at Rhoda Goldman Plaza — "not a fit right now, check back in Q3."
James Whitcombe, Admissions at Sequoias SF — 30-min call confirmed Mon 10:00 AM.
Outreach batch sent — 52 contacts across hospitals, attorneys, and senior living.
Rachel Brodsky, Care Manager at Institute on Aging — open to a partnership conversation.
